notes: Scotland are without key creative midfielder Billy Gilmour (knee, tournament-ending) and defender Scott McKenna is a fitness doubt after picking up a knock vs Haiti; Ché Adams started vs Haiti but had a pre-tournament thigh injury concern. Morocco are missing winger Abde Ezzalzouli (knee, ruled out before tournament) and cornerstone defender Nayef Aguerd (injury withdrawal), both confirmed squad replacements before their opener vs Brazil; no new injury concerns reported after the Brazil draw.
